CMS Development

Content platforms that empower your team.

Webcore Solutions builds headless and composable CMS platforms for businesses in Dubai and beyond — giving editorial teams full content control without developer dependency.

Platform Overview

A CMS your editors will actually love using.

Purpose-built for editorial speed — every workflow is designed around the people who use it daily. No tickets, no queues, no waiting. Your team publishes on their own terms from day one.

  • 10× faster publishing

    Editors ship content independently — zero developer dependency

  • Multi-site & multi-language

    One structured source of truth for every market and locale

  • Zero-downtime migrations

    From any legacy platform with full content and URL fidelity

120+

Platforms built

3–6w

Delivery window

100%

Editor adoption

Production-ready
Editorial Platform
10×Faster publishing
120+Platforms delivered
30 daysPost-launch support
What We Build

Every CMS capability,
under one roof.

From headless architecture to editorial workflow design — we cover the entire content platform stack in-house, end to end.

Headless CMS Architecture

Decouple your content layer from your presentation layer — delivering content to any channel, device or platform without rebuilding from scratch.

Composable Content Platforms

Modular content models built around your editorial workflow — not the other way around. Stack best-of-breed tools that grow with your organisation.

Editorial Workflow Design

Structured publishing flows with role-based permissions, review queues and scheduled publishing — ship content fast without stepping on each other.

Migration & Re-platforming

Safe, zero-downtime migrations from WordPress, Drupal, Contentful and more — with full content, media and metadata fidelity.

Custom Content Modelling

Content schemas engineered for flexibility and longevity — supporting localisation, multi-site and personalisation from day one.

Governance & Permissions

Fine-grained access control, audit logs, content locking and approval workflows — so the right people publish the right content, every time.

Deliverables

What you walk away with.

  • Headless CMS fully configured and production-ready
  • Custom content models and structured schemas
  • Role-based permissions and editorial workflows
  • Frontend integration (Next.js, Nuxt, or your stack)
  • API documentation and content delivery guide
  • Editor training sessions and written user guides
  • 30-day post-launch support included
Platforms & Tools

The right CMS for your needs.

We're platform-agnostic — we evaluate every option against your specific requirements and recommend the one that serves your editors and your architecture best.

Sanity
Contentful
Strapi
Payload CMS
WordPress
Storyblok
Directus

Editor-first philosophy. Every CMS we build is designed so non-technical editors feel confident and autonomous — no developer dependency for day-to-day publishing.

Our Process

From brief to live platform —
five clear steps.

A structured CMS delivery process refined across 120+ content platform projects.

01

Discovery

Content audit, editorial workflow mapping and platform evaluation.

02

Model

Content schema design, taxonomy planning and governance structure.

03

Build

CMS configuration, custom fields, integrations and API connections.

04

Train

Editor onboarding, documentation and workflow rehearsal sessions.

05

Launch

Migration, go-live support, monitoring and ongoing optimisation.

Client Stories

What our clients say.

Start your CMS project

"We moved from a rigid CMS that required a developer for every change to a headless platform built by Webcore. Our editors were fully independent within a week of training."

Sophie Carver

Head of Content, Resolve Media

"The composable content platform Webcore Solutions built handles our 10,000-SKU catalogue without breaking a sweat. Publishing time went from 2 hours to 15 minutes."

Omar Al Nasser

Digital Director, Kestrel Retail

"We needed a WordPress build that non-technical editors could actually use. Webcore designed the editorial workflow from scratch and it's genuinely a pleasure to work in."

Emma Clarke

Marketing Manager, Horizon Group
